title: Revert "Support Windows11 As A sshuttle Server"
body:
Reverts sshuttle/sshuttle#993

This change was made in error. See discussion in #993.

Explore the source code to identify the files and functions to modify.

step_plan.summary: Reverts Windows11-specific Windivert support by disabling Windivert-based paths and features in the Windivert module, ensuring cross-platform paths remain functional.

steps.operation: Disable Windivert outgoing divert path by early-return in Windivert._egress_divert
steps.reason: Reverts Windows11 Windivert-based routing by ensuring the outbound divert path cannot be engaged.
steps.side_effects: Linux/macOS paths remain unaffected; Windows Windivert path will be inert. Tests referencing Windivert egress behavior should be updated or skipped. CLI behavior should no longer advertise Windows-specific routing.

steps.operation: Disable Windivert inbound divert path by early-return in Windivert._ ingress_divert
steps.reason: Reverts Windows11 Windivert-based routing by ensuring the inbound divert path cannot be engaged.
steps.side_effects: Inbound Windows Windivert path inert; may affect integration tests expecting Windivert ingress behavior.

steps.operation: Disable Windows firewall lifecycle orchestration by bypassing Windivert.wait_for_firewall_ready
steps.reason: Prevent Windows-specific firewall lifecycle from starting, removing Windows-only path.
steps.side_effects: Firewall-related thread lifecycle will be no-ops; avoids Windows-specific timing issues in tests.

steps.operation: Disable Windows firewall setup by no-op in Windivert.setup_firewall
steps.reason: Remove Windows-only firewall wiring introduced for Windivert path.
steps.side_effects: Windows firewall configuration steps are skipped; no impact on non-Windivert paths.

steps.operation: Hide Windivert features from the feature set by returning empty features in Windivert.get_supported_features
steps.reason: Ensures Windivert features are not advertised or selectable.
steps.side_effects: CLI and tests relying on Windivert features should stop expecting them; may require adjustments to feature checks.

steps.operation: Deactivate Windivert path by making Windivert.is_supported always return False
steps.reason: Guarantees Windivert path cannot be selected or used at runtime.
steps.side_effects: Windivert path cannot be chosen even if discovered; Windows users will fall back to non-Windivert paths; tests referencing Windivert support must be updated.
